name: FullCalendar
description: A comprehensive, full-featured calendar component with multiple view modes (day, week, month, year, agenda), drag-and-drop event management, event resizing, customizable rendering, and extensive date utilities. Built with React context for state management and supports both single-day and multi-day events with intelligent positioning.
usage_guidelines: Use for event management, scheduling, booking systems, and calendar applications.
Provide events array with id, startDate, endDate, title, color, description, and type.
Handle event interactions via callbacks (onCellClick, onEventClick, onChange).
Switch between view modes using the header controls (day, week, month, year, agenda).
Customize event rendering with renderEvent callback for custom event appearance.
Use onMoreClick to handle overflow events in month view.
Leverage drag-and-drop functionality for event rescheduling (built-in with DndProvider).
Customize header with renderHeaderStart and renderHeaderEnd for custom controls.

events.description: Array of calendar events to display. Each event must have id, startDate (ISO string), endDate (ISO string), title, color, description, and type.

onCellClick.description: Callback fired when a calendar cell (date) is clicked. Useful for creating new events.

onEventClick.description: Callback fired when an event is clicked. Useful for viewing/editing event details.

renderEvent.description: Custom event renderer. Return object with className and content for custom event appearance.

onChange.description: Callback fired when events are modified (drag-and-drop, resize). Receives updated events array and the modified event.

onMoreClick.description: Callback fired when '+X more' link is clicked in month view. Receives overflowed events and all events for that day.

renderHeaderStart.description: Custom renderer for header start section. Receives navigation functions and state.

renderHeaderEnd.description: Custom renderer for header end section. Receives navigation functions and state.

properties.startDate: string - ISO date string for event start
properties.endDate: string - ISO date string for event end
properties.title: string - Event title/name
properties.color: string - Event color (blue, green, red, yellow, purple, orange, gray)
properties.disabled: boolean - Optional flag to disable event interactions

properties.className: string - Additional CSS classes for event

month.description: Monthly calendar grid showing all days of the month
features: Shows 6 weeks grid with previous/next month overflow days
Multi-day events span across multiple cells
Single-day events show as colored bars
Intelligent event positioning to avoid overlaps
'+X more' link for overflow events (max 5 visible per day)
Click on cells to create events
Shows 7 days with hourly time slots
Multi-day events shown in header row
Single-day events positioned in time slots

day.description: Single day view with detailed time slots
features: Shows single day with hourly time slots

year.description: Yearly overview with mini month grids
features: Shows all 12 months in grid layout
Event indicators on dates with events
Click on dates to navigate to month view

FullCalendarProvider.description: Context provider for calendar state management

useFullCalendar.usage: const { selectedDate, view, setView, events } = useFullCalendar();

FullCalendarDndProvider.description: Drag-and-drop context provider for event interactions

FullCalendarHeader.description: Calendar header with navigation controls and view selector
features: Today button to jump to current date

FullCalendarBody.description: Main calendar body that renders appropriate view based on selected mode

WeekView.description: Weekly calendar with time slots component

DayView.description: Single day calendar with time slots component

YearView.description: Yearly overview with mini months component

EventBlock.description: Event display component for time-based views

EventBadge.description: Compact event badge for month view

EventBullet.description: Event bullet indicator for year view

navigateDate.description: Navigate date based on view and direction

getCalendarCells.description: Get calendar cells for month view including overflow days

calculateMonthEventPositions.description: Calculate optimal event positions to avoid overlaps in month view

groupEvents.description: Group overlapping events for time-based views

getEventBlockStyle.description: Calculate event block positioning styles for time-based views
getEventBlockStyle.signature: (event, day, groupIndex, groupSize) => { top, width, left }

getColorClasses.description: Get Tailwind CSS classes for event colors

styling_info.visual_description: Full calendar interface with header showing date and navigation controls. Month view displays grid with 7 columns (days) and 6 rows (weeks). Events appear as colored bars/badges. Week/day views show time slots with events positioned by time. Year view shows 12 mini month grids. Responsive layout with dark mode support.

event_colors.note: Each color has bullet and bar variants with light/dark mode support

Do: Provide complete event data with valid ISO date strings
Handle all event interaction callbacks (onCellClick, onEventClick, onChange)
Use appropriate view mode for your use case
Provide loading states for async operations
Use custom event rendering for rich event content
Handle timezone considerations in date strings
Use meaningful event types for categorization
Implement proper error handling for date parsing
Dont: Don't load too many events at once (implement pagination/lazy loading)
Don't forget to handle timezone conversions
Don't use for simple date picking (use DatePicker component)
Don't forget to validate drag/drop operations
Don't mutate events array directly (use onChange callback)
Don't forget to handle event conflicts/overlaps
Don't use invalid date formats (must be ISO strings)
Don't forget to provide unique event IDs

integration_notes: Uses dayjs for date manipulation with isSameOrBefore and isSameOrAfter plugins
Drag-and-drop powered by React DnD (built-in provider)
Context-based state management for calendar state
Automatic event positioning algorithm prevents overlaps
Supports both controlled and uncontrolled usage
Events must use ISO date strings for proper parsing
Multi-day events automatically span across calendar cells
Time-based views use 24-hour format by default (toggleable)
performance_notes: Event positioning is calculated once per render
Lazy rendering for year view mini months
Consider pagination for large event datasets
Virtual scrolling recommended for agenda view with many events
